explanations:
Man: Now, colour the bird in the apple tree.
Girl: Where? In the apple tree?
Man: That’s right. Colour that bird yellow.
Girl: I love that colour!
Man: So do I.

Man: Can you see the bird behind the boy with the kite?
Girl: The bird behind the boy with the kite … oh, yes. I can see it!
Man: Good! Make that one black, please.
Girl: OK.

Man: Now colour the bird under the plane.
Girl: Sorry? The bird under the plane? Oh, there it is!
Man: Have you got an orange pencil?
Girl: Yes!
Man: Great. Colour it with that pencil, please.

Man: There’s a bird next to the camera.
Girl: I can see it!
Man: Good. Make that bird green.
Girl: OK. I’m colouring the bird … next to the camera … now.
Man: Well done!

Girl: What now?
Man: Would you like to colour the bird between the children?
Girl: Yes. What colour?
Man: You can choose the colour.
Girl: I can make it red!
Man: Great.
